capabilities: Combine streaming processing insights with database indexing to create a unified execution procedure, leveraging shared steps and tools.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from streaming processing and database indexing by applying domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert the merged output by using domain-appropriate validation tools; confirm error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Filter candidate records for processing by executing domain-specific detection algorithms; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assign results using domain-specific classification tools; verify error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Log all operations with detailed metadata including operation_duration_ms and result_code to maintain a comprehensive audit trail for future analysis using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate streaming processing with database indexing by merging workflows, ensuring error-free execution, and maintaining audit trails.
title: Streaming Processing

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merge omits NULL handling: records with NULL key fields are silently dropped, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Increased error rates when validation tools are misconfigured, causing false negatives and allowing erroneous data to propagate.
Audit trail gaps when logging fails intermittently, causing incomplete operation records and hindering future analysis.
metrics: the merged output by using domain-appropriate validation tools
